title: FBI Files related to Victor Vasilevich Afanassiev - Афанасьев Владимир Викторович - FBI file 100-SF-25972

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FBI Files related to Victor Vasilevich Afanassiev - Афанасьев Владимир Викторович - FBI file 100-SF-25972
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

A review and release of all FBI documents related to a file number of 100-SF-25972 which was transferred from the FBI's custody to NARA. This file is related to man named Victor Vasilevich Afanassiev (or possibly Vladimir Viktorovich Afanasiev). 

According to the FBI a documentation related to Victor Vasilevich Afanassiev was transferred to NARA. The file number referenced by the FBI is 100-SF-25972. Here's a link to a message from the FBI that mentions the relevant file number transferred to NARA: https://cdn.muckrock.com/foia_files/2026/05/27/Eaf59ab3ae7d1693237a766ceb0dac26355c49ca109896ee9dc_Q325370_D165851305.pdf

Thank you to NARA for everything it does, and for the effort to review and hopefully release file 100-SF-25972. I look forward to working together to complete this request.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robert Delaware
